channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Fighting enemies in Stranger Than Heaven feels a bit like wading through soup — sloppy and slow
item.description: The dodgy combat system of Stranger Than Heaven makes a poor impression at Summer Game Fest 2026.

item.title: Gemini can now adjust your picture settings on Google TV
item.description: Gemini can - at least on some TCL models - adjust your TV's picture settings.

item.title: Don de sang : Samsung veut vous faire oublier les aiguilles grâce au Galaxy XR
item.description: Samsung mobilise son casque de réalité mixte Galaxy XR pour rendre le processus de don de sang plus agréable. Au programme : jardin virtuel, musique zen et plantation de graines virtuelles. L’expérience sera présentée lors de divers événements à travers le monde.

item.title: So you want to buy a gaming handheld PC
item.description: Gaming handhelds are amazing. They make it so much easier to fit all kinds of games into my day. Sadly, they’re less affordable than they’ve ever been — due to an unprecedented, AI-fueled shortage of memory chips, an unforced oil crisis, rampant inflation, fallout from tariffs, and more. But that’s not going to stop you. […]

item.title: The Nintendo DS is still the best gaming handheld for travel
item.description: Even with the looming specter of rising prices, there's never been a better time for portable gaming. The Steam Deck has ushered in a new era of handheld PCs, the Analogue Pocket and other Game Boy-style remakes are making retro games more approachable than ever, the Playdate has led to an alternate universe of weirdo […]

item.title: Summer Upgrade Week
item.description: The sun is out, the sky is clear. It’s time to get outside and disconnect — from work, at least. This summer, we’re looking at all the ways to upgrade our free time indoors and out, from smart lights for the backyard to great gadgets to bring camping to ways to wind down at the local library.

item.title: ‘This is going to make a massive difference’: iPhone snatchers are being foiled by our new Apple partnership, says the UK’s Met Police — and another clever iOS trick could be coming soon
item.description: The Met Police and Apple want to make stolen phones useless, and progress is already being made on that front.

item.title: Le télescope James-Webb révèle comment une galaxie peut mourir en pleine jeunesse !
item.description: À peine un milliard d'années après le Big Bang, cette galaxie connaît une croissance fulgurante en formant des étoiles à un rythme exceptionnel. Pourtant, les astronomes ont découvert qu'elle expulse simultanément d'immenses quantités de gaz, le combustible indispensable à sa survie. Une...

item.title: Qu’il est loin le temps ou le Roborock Qrevo Curv coûtait 1 500 € : cet aspirateur robot laveur se trouve désormais à seulement 449 €
item.description: Le Roborock Qrevo Curv est un aspirateur robot laveur haut de gamme, en tout cas à sa sortie en 2024, qui passe de 1 499,99 euros à 449 euros sur Electro Depot.

item.title: 6 Best Digital Notebooks (2026): ReMarkable, Kobo, Kindle
item.description: These nifty tools combine the ease of jotting notes by hand with the power of saving them digitally.

item.title: ‘Google Management Has Lost Its Moral Compass': Google director jumps ship over company’s new AI contracts with DoD, Pentagon
item.description: Google director of Android platform security ditches company over contracts with Defense Department

item.title: The Argos summer sale starts now — get up to 50% off appliances, toys, TVs, phones, and even more tech
item.description: Argos has just launched a mega summer sale, so I've looked through and summarised the biggest categories, while also highlighting the 12 best deals.

item.title: Freebox : Free déploie une mise à jour pour booster votre Wi-Fi (et corriger un bug majeur)
item.description: Votre Wi-Fi Freebox s'essouffle quand vous changez de pièce ? L'opérateur vient de déployer une fonction expérimentale prometteuse pour optimiser automatiquement votre connexion, en plus de sauver la mise aux possesseurs de Google Pixel. On vous explique comment l'activer.

item.title: Seed could be the most revolutionary life simulator since The Sims — and you can experience all of it with your friends
item.description: We go hands-on with the staggeringly advanced life simulator Seed at Summer Game Fest 2026.

item.title: 14 leaders on handling major client loss
item.description: While not fun, losing a customer can make your business stronger. It’s inevitable that a business will lose a client at some point. It could be your business’s fault or it could be external circumstances that are out of your control. No matter the reason, a client loss can sting and you may need to reevaluate how you operate to prevent further losses. We asked our Fast Company Impact Council members how they handled their first major contract loss or contract cancellation. For some, it involved turning inward and rethinking operations. Others took an attitude of “it happens—move on.” Here’s th...

item.title: Mental health is not a personal problem
item.description: It’s a leadership issue, and every leader must take it seriously. On April 15, we should have marked Polina’s 23rd birthday. But her 18th birthday was the last one we celebrated together. In September 2021, after years of struggling with her mental health, my niece died tragically.

item.title: For a limited time, DataImpulse is giving +25% bonus traffic to all users
item.description: Boost your proxy power with DataImpulse’s deal

item.title: You can get the AirPods equalizer update right now — but you probably shouldn't
item.description: Most AirPods and AirPods Pro owners will get EQ controls soon, but via multiple betas, it's actually available now.

item.title: US surveillance law to expire for first time after lawmakers reject Trump’s controversial pick to lead spy agencies
item.description: The spy law known as Section 702, which authorizes the NSA and FBI's warrantless surveillance, will all but certainly expire on Friday for the first time.

item.title: Le Galaxy Z Fold 7 récupère deux fonctionnalités hyper pratiques
item.description: Le Galaxy Z Fold 7 reçoit une mise à jour avec deux nouvelles fonctionnalités basées sur l'IA : priorisation des notifications et résumé de documents. Ces ajouts visent à améliorer la productivité des utilisateurs en facilitant le tri des informations. Cependant, la fonctionnalité de résumés de notifications n'est pas incluse dans cette mise à jour....

item.title: Pour préparer vos vacances sereinement, ce pack Ring avec 2 caméras de surveillance intérieur/extérieur est à -33%
item.description: Dans ce pack Ring on retrouve une caméra Stick Up Cam 1080p et une Indoor Plus 2K pour 59,99 euros au lieu de 89,98 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: 4 Best Floodlight Security Cameras (2026) After Thorough Testing
item.description: Light up and secure your driveway, backyard, or porch with a floodlight security camera.

item.title: This portable light is great for way more than camping
item.description: It's intended for camping, but BougeRV's T1 light is so versatile that it also makes for a great summer travel companion that'll continue to light the dark corners of your life long after you return. I used it for a few months during a recent road trip in my camper van, and it's the light […]

item.title: Old Nvidia GPUs are being resurrected to cope with the RAM crisis — but one big chip maker seems determined that a memory shortage won't happen again
item.description: The RAM shortage is driving Nvidia's partners to bring back half-decade-old boards — but SK Hynix has a masterplan to solve future memory woes.

item.title: Au Japon, Nintendo limite l’achat de la Switch 2 à ses joueurs les plus fidèles
item.description: Face à la hausse du prix de la nouvelle console de Nintendo et pour lutter contre le phénomène de revente, le constructeur impose au Japon une condition d’achat pour sa version multilingue.

item.title: Oracle warns customers of critical PeopleSoft attack after hundreds of servers hacked by apparent ShinyHunters data theft attacks
item.description: High-severity CVSS 9.8 PeopleSoft vulnerability caused over 100 organizations to become victims, including universities.

item.title: The Morning After: Apple's quest to make AI useful to its users
item.description: Apple's WWDC saw the company look to tidy up its existing work and make AI useful rather than throw a thousand eye-catching features at users.

item.title: On connaît enfin le prix et l’autonomie de la Peugeot électrique la plus performante : voici la e-208 GTi
item.description: Peugeot ouvre les commandes de sa voiture électrique la plus performante : la e-208 GTi. L'occasion de connaître le prix mais aussi toute la fiche technique. La première GTi 100 % électrique arrive avec un argument de poids et un point faible bien identifié.

item.title: Philips Hue : cette mise à jour que tous les fans de foot attendaient pour la Coupe du Monde
item.description: Philips Hue lance sa nouvelle fonctionnalité « Sports Live » pour synchroniser en temps réel vos lumières connectées avec les matchs de la Coupe du Monde.

item.title: I'm using ChatGPT to help me follow the World Cup — these are the 5 prompts I'd recommend to any fan
item.description: Whether you want deeper stats, better planning or help coping with penalty drama, these five AI prompts can make the World Cup a little easier to enjoy.

item.title: Apple says Siri AI won't suck up to you
item.description: In an interview, Apple's SVP of engineering explains how the new Siri wasn't designed to be sycophantic.

item.title: Pedal Electric H/T Review: A Fast, Powerful, Stylish Ebike
item.description: The pedal-assist can be jerky, but the throttle offers smooth, powerful acceleration.

item.title: Meet the NASA crew who will keep Artemis III on track for its 2028 moon landing
item.description: The New Glenn explosion hasn’t slowed NASA, which is moving toward its next Artemis mission for Earth-orbit testing to safely return humans to the lunar surface before China. The baton has been passed.

item.title: Someone hacked his Whoop to see which of his colleagues raised his stress levels the most and I need this immediately
item.description: This is one of the best uses of a Whoop and Claude Fable 5 we've seen: matching heart rate levels to meeting attendees.

item.title: Six ans après, Google va enfin relancer son enceinte connectée Google Home
item.description: L'enceinte fantôme promise pour le printemps sort enfin du bois, et la marque Nest reste au placard. Gemini s'installe au salon, l'abonnement n'est pas loin derrière.

item.title: Why Real-Life Disclosure Day Will Look Nothing Like Steven Spielberg’s New Movie
item.description: Previous landmark scientific discoveries like the Higgs boson provide a better template for what it will take to confirm whether aliens have made contact with Earth.

item.title: Giant, beautiful soccer balls are popping up around New York City
item.description: ‘The Art of The Game’ celebrates the World Cup through monumental soccer ball–shaped sculptures. From joining a stranger to cheer on a team to sharing a bench when admiring a painting, there are few things that bring people together quite like art and sports. Now, as the World Cup begins, both forces are coming together in a public sculpture installation across New York and New Jersey....
